This '''probe ship''' was used by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to scout for possible new locations, including [[Kharzet III]], for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

{{Ship-stub}}
